info.name: Tally Prime - Sales API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Sales vouchers from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>SalesVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="MySalesVouchers">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, VOUCHERTYPENAME, AMOUNT, GUID, REFERENCE, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>SalesFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="SalesFilter">$$IsSales:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all Sales vouchers for a date range

item.name: Get Sales Voucher Details by GUID

request.description: Fetch complete details of a specific Sales voucher using its GUID

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>SalesWithItems</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="SalesWithInventory">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GUID</FETCH>
            <FETCH>ALLINVENTORYENTRIES.LIST : STOCKITEMNAME, ACTUALQTY, BILLEDQTY, RATE, AMOUNT</FETCH>
            <FILTER>SalesFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="SalesFilter">$$IsSales:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch Sales vouchers with inventory item details

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>CustomerSalesSummary</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="CustomerSales">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT</FETCH>
            <FILTER>SalesFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="SalesFilter">$$IsSales:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get sales summary grouped by customer/party

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>SalesWithGST</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="SalesWithGST">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GUID</FETCH>
            <FETCH>ALLLEDGERENTRIES.LIST : LEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GSTRATE</FETCH>
            <FILTER>SalesFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="SalesFilter">$$IsSales:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch Sales vouchers with GST/tax details
